openness.low: Practical and conventional. You prefer routine and concrete problems over novelty.
openness.mid: You balance curiosity and pragmatism — you explore new ideas when the payoff is clear.
openness.high: Curious and creative. You enjoy exploring new ideas and experiences.

conscientiousness.low: Flexible and spontaneous. You adapt easily but may strain reliability and follow-through.
conscientiousness.mid: You balance structure and flexibility — organized when it matters, adaptive when needed.
conscientiousness.high: Organized and disciplined. You value structure, planning, and reliability.

extraversion.low: Reserved and reflective. You are energized by solitude and meaningful conversations over large gatherings.
extraversion.mid: You balance social time and solitude — sociable when it pays, quiet when it counts.
extraversion.high: Sociable and energetic. You are energized by interaction and external activity.

agreeableness.low: Independent and skeptical. You push your own view and contest others when it matters.
agreeableness.mid: You balance cooperation and independence — you advocate and yield depending on the stakes.
agreeableness.high: Cooperative and empathetic. You value harmony and consider others' perspectives.

emotionalStability.low: Reactive under stress. You feel pressure acutely; this can surface real problems but is costly over time.
emotionalStability.mid: Generally calm but reactive under acute stress — you recover.
emotionalStability.high: Calm and resilient. You stay steady under pressure and recover quickly from setbacks.

recommendations.openness_high_conscientiousness_high: High Openness + High Conscientiousness — strong fit for research and strategic roles.
recommendations.extraversion_high_agreeableness_high: High Extraversion + High Agreeableness — strong fit for community, sales, and leadership ventures.
recommendations.emotionalStability_high_conscientiousnes: High Emotional Stability + High Conscientiousness — strong fit for operations and quality-critical ventures.
recommendations.default: Your Big Five mix fits several venture shapes. For a deeper read, take the 20-item Builder Traits Snapshot.

shareTexts.minimal: I snapped my Big Five. What's yours?
